## Checklist

- [ ] Frontend tests pass with no new failures (`cd frontend && npm run test -- --run`)
- [ ] Production build succeeds (`cd frontend && npm run build`)
- [ ] Contract checks pass (`clarinet check`)
- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or mnemonics committed
- [ ] Commit is GPG-signed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
